subject: Joint Distributions
question: Suppose $X, Y$ are two continuous random variables with joint probability density function $f_{XY}(x,y) = \begin{cases} 12xy(1-x) & 0 < x, y < 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ (a) Find $f_{X|Y}(x|y)$. Are $X$ and $Y$ independent? (b) Find $\Pr(Y < \frac{1}{2} | X > \frac{1}{2})$.
